name: 12L rANS + LeakyReLU(0.95)² + Soft XSA
author: Dan
blurb: 12L enabled by per-tensor rANS compression. Soft XSA with learned per-head alpha on all layers via position-tiled Triton kernel. LeakyReLU(0.95)² activation. 10% magnitude pruning. 1xH100 extrapolating 8xH100 token budget. N-gram eval forthcoming.
